title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・どでけえ好敵手よ

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(Now's my chance to beat 'em! I've gotta run like
my life depends on it!)

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Inari One steals the lead! There she goes! Inari
One takes first!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(Hehe... I can barely stand. Runnin' next to those
two's left me all in tatters!)

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
To tell the truth, I underestimated ya. It's my loss
today.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But stayin' a loser doesn't sit right with me. I'll
definitely take ya down a notch, so ya better
watch out.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Let's do this again at the next autumn Tenno Sho,
Inari.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Sure thing! Get ready for round two, right here at
Tokyo Racecourse!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: (Hehe... That's one big promise I just made!)
